html:
2026-0282
2026-03-30GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityArrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the European Resilience from Space for Earth Observation (ERS-EO) ProgrammeOrder authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Arrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the European Resilience from Space for Earth Observation (ERS-EO) Programme.N/A
subject: Arrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the European Resilience from Space for Earth Observation (ERS-EO) Programme
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Arrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the European Resilience from Space for Earth Observation (ERS-EO) Programme.
